subcodes.first_line: Thou hast ever been and art still remembered before this Wronged One, from the inception of the Cause until this hour, without veil or concealment from the servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال نزد مظلوم مذکور بوده و هستی از اول امر الی حین من غیر ستر و حجاب عباد
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
